story.title: You already know this feeling.
story.p1: The feeling of finishing the song. After hours of composing, writing, recording, mixing, and iterating.
story.p2: You are excited to show it to the world. But you need a video. A music video worthy of your song.
story.quote: I need a budget. I need time. I need to find people to help me.
story.p3: In that moment, you feel stuck.
story.exists: LyricVideo AI exists for that moment.
story.solution_left_1: It was built by musicians, for musicians. We have been there, and we get it.
story.solution_left_2: Our AI helps bring your vision to life without turning your song into a template.

maker.title: The AI Lyric Video Maker for Music
maker.p1: LyricVideo AI is an AI lyric video maker designed specifically for music. Most AI video tools are built for ads and reels. This is built for songs.
maker.p2: Start with lyrics and a song, then make it yours with story prompts, scenes, colors, fonts, and images.

pricing_faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions

pricing_cta.copy: You've finished your song. Let people see it. Let people feel it. Do you have any doubts?

faq.title: FAQ
faq.description: Feel free to contact us for any questions or doubts. We'll be more than happy to help you!

rights.question: Can I post the video to YouTube or other platforms?
rights.answer: Yes. As long as you own the rights to the song or have permission from the artist, you can post the video on YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, or any other platform.

free_preview.question: Is there a free trial?
free_preview.answer: Yes. When you sign up, you get free credits to create and preview videos. To export your video, you can upgrade or buy credits.

models.question: Which AI models do you use?
models.answer: The workflow is provider-ready. Kie is the preferred visual generation path, while transcription, storyboard, and rendering stay replaceable.

static_video.question: How do you generate the videos?
static_video.answer: The MVP creates static lyric videos from lyrics, scene images, subtitle styling, and audio timing. Image-to-video and lip sync are later upgrades.

credits.question: Can I purchase additional credits?
credits.answer: Yes. You can buy credit packs at any time and use them for transcription, images, and export jobs.

cta.line2: Let people see it. Let people feel it.

seo.title: Free Lyric Video Maker Online — No Watermark, No Signup
seo.description: Make lyric videos for free with AI. No watermark, no account needed to start. Upload your song, lyrics auto-transcribed and synced, download in HD. Works on any device.

hero.badge: No watermark. No card. No fake free trial.
hero.subhead: Actually free. No watermark, no signup wall, no "free trial" that asks for a credit card. Upload a song — lyrics are transcribed and synced automatically.
hero.upload_note: Drop your song here or click to browse · MP3, WAV, FLAC, AAC, OGG · up to 15 min
hero.lyrics_option: Have your own lyrics file? Paste or upload LRC/TXT instead after the automatic transcription step.

steps.title: Upload your song
steps.description: Drop an MP3, WAV, or FLAC. No account needed.

steps.title: Lyrics appear automatically
steps.description: The AI transcribes and syncs every line to the beat — about 30 seconds. Click any line to edit. Have a lyrics file? You can paste it instead.

steps.title: Pick a style and download
steps.description: Choose a free style, render, and download in 1080p HD — no watermark, ready for YouTube, TikTok, or Instagram.

comparison.title: Free plan vs Pro — the honest version
comparison.note: Only upgrade if the free plan wins you over first.

use_cases.title: Make free lyric videos for every platform

items.title: Spotify Canvas-style loops
items.description: short vertical visuals for your tracks

items.question: Is this lyric video maker really free?
items.answer: Yes. The free plan includes 3 videos per month in full 1080p HD with no watermark. No credit card required.

items.question: Will you add a watermark later?
items.answer: No. No watermark on free videos is a permanent commitment, not a launch promo.

items.question: What happens when I use all 3 free videos?
items.answer: Nothing bad. Your videos stay yours, your account stays free, and your quota resets on the 1st of each month. Upgrade only if waiting doesn't work for you.

items.question: Do I need to type or paste the lyrics myself?
items.answer: No — lyrics are transcribed automatically from the audio, in 50+ languages. You can paste your own lyrics file (LRC/TXT) instead if you prefer.

items.question: Can I make vertical lyric videos for TikTok on the free plan?
items.answer: Yes. Every free video can export in 16:9, 9:16, and 1:1 — one click each.

items.question: Can I use free videos commercially?
items.answer: Yes — your exports are yours, including for monetized channels. Just make sure you have rights to the music you upload.

bottom_cta.title: Free should mean free.
bottom_cta.description: Make your first lyric video now — and see if we live up to it.
bottom_cta.pricing_prefix: Need more videos, all styles, or 4K?
